scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix scratch/server && npm install --prefix scratch/client
scripts.install:scratch: npm install --prefix scratch/server && npm install --prefix scratch/client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:scratch: concurrently -n scratch-api,scratch-ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix scratch/server" "npm run dev --prefix scratch/client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
